scenarios.rationale: The operating system (RHEL 7) is assessed as EOL, so patching or upgrading is recommended.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch to standard Linux Operating System
scenarios.rationale: The application already runs on a standard Linux distribution (RHEL 7).
The current stack (RHEL 7, Java 11, Websphere 8.5) is legacy and would make an ARM migration high risk.
The current application server (Websphere 8.5) is assessed as EOL, which makes replacement relevant.

scenarios.scenario_name: Application Migration to Cloud Infrastructure (Lift & Shift)
scenarios.rationale: The application is already deployed in AWS, On-premise.
The legacy stack (RHEL 7, Java 11) makes near-term containerization difficult.
The application is custom-built and integration-heavy, so decoupling and refactoring would likely improve modernization outcomes.
The database (SQL Server 2022) is already current according to the provided lifecycle rules.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch DB Engine to open-source database solution
scenarios.rationale: The application uses a proprietary database (SQL Server 2022), so an open-source alternative could reduce cost and lock-in.
The technology assessment found 2 EOL and 1 outdated component(s).
